SELECT
  (
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.element = 'h' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
    / COUNT(T1.element)
  ) * 100 AS ratio,
  (
    CASE
      WHEN T2.label = '+'
      THEN 'carcinogenic'
      ELSE 'non-carcinogenic'
    END
  ) AS label
FROM atom AS T1
INNER JOIN molecule AS T2

FROM "yearmonth" AS T1
INNER JOIN customers AS T2
  ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE
  SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2012'
GROUP BY
  T1.Segment
HAVING
  SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
ORDER BY
  CASE
    WHEN SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN (
      (
        (
          SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
        ) / SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(T1.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
      ) * 100
    )
    ELSE 0
  END DESC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT
  (
    (
      SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2012-12-31' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN T2.Date BETWEEN '2013-01-01' AND '2013-12-31' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Date BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2012-12-31' THEN T1.Consumption ELSE 0 END)
  )
FROM "yearmonth" AS T1
JOIN "yearmonth" AS T2
  ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE
  T1.CustomerID = (
    SELECT
      CustomerID
    FROM "transactions_1k"
    WHERE
      Amount = 634.8 AND strftime('%Y', Date) = '2012' AND strftime('%m', Date) = '08' AND strftime('%d', Date) = '25'
  );	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
